name: code-research
description: Stage-first read-only code research recipe: parallel repository investigation followed by a concise source-backed synthesis for the runtime task.

tasks.prompt: Use the runtime task as the research objective. Identify the relevant command/API/module surface, entrypoints, and public contracts. Do not modify files. Return concise Markdown with concrete file paths and evidence.

Use the runtime task as the research objective. Trace the relevant data, artifact, state, or control flow through the repository. Do not modify files. Return concise Markdown with concrete file paths and ownership responsibilities.

stages.prompt: Using Source Stage Context and the runtime task, synthesize one concise implementation map. Do not inspect or modify files unless needed to resolve contradictions. Return Markdown with sections: Objective, Relevant files, How it works, Evidence, Open questions.
